note: This manifest file's own git blob necessarily predates the commit that adds it, so it cannot self-report its own finalization commit hash without amending after the fact. The finalization commit hash is recorded in docs/40_Tag_Readiness_v2.5.0-rc2.md and is the commit the v2.5.0-rc2 tag points at. v2.5.0-rc1 (138c8743) is unchanged and remains a separate, valid, immutable tag.

fixed: Apartment images never rendered in a real browser for demo_platform/demo_platform_two results (file:// source URLs blocked by browser security). Added a same-origin /apartments/<id>/media/<filename> route reusing the existing WebSecurity.safe_join() guard. Commit b013ad10440ff4ac76232309000af263833bb379.
changes_since_rc1.not_changed: Everything else from RC1 — same features, same architecture, same acceptance/security criteria. No new product features, no redesign.

image_route_security.path_leakage_in_error_response: none (plain 404 template, no filesystem path disclosed)
image_route_security.guard_reused: WebSecurity.safe_join() — same helper already used elsewhere in the web layer's security design; no new path-traversal logic invented

security.secret_scan: clean (no API keys, passwords, SMTP credentials, webhook secrets, bearer tokens, or private keys found in tracked files)

workflows_completed: monitoring (run twice with real fixture changes)

supported_execution_interfaces: CLI (python -m src.ui.cli, monitoring_cli, notification_cli, feedback_cli, discovery_cli)
Web dashboard (Flask, server-rendered, localhost by default)
JSON API v1 (/api/v1/*, consumed by the same web dashboard's own JS and available to any local HTTP client)
fixture_tested_capabilities: Search pipeline (discovery, connectors, analysis, filtering, geo enrichment, ranking, reporting) against demo_platform/demo_platform_two
Automatic platform discovery against a fake page fetcher
Continuous monitoring and change detection against deterministic fixture reruns
Notification delivery (console/file channels) against synthetic and real pipeline-recorded events
Apartment image serving via the new same-origin media route (RC2)
live_tested_capabilities: Web dashboard and JSON API (real Flask app, real facade calls, real SQLite database)
CLI startup and search execution against real Playwright-rendered local fixture pages
Backup creation, checksum verification, and restore (real SQLite online backup API)
Installation health check against the real local environment
A full controlled local pilot session against the real running dashboard (RC2)
production_provider_dependencies: RentCast (requires RENTCAST_API_KEY; the one real, non-demo data connector)
Email notification channel (requires real SMTP credentials)
Webhook notification channel (requires a real webhook URL and signing secret)
Ollama AI provider (requires a locally running Ollama server; null/no-op provider is the default fallback)
known_limitations: walking_distance/public_transport_time filters are a normalized 0.0-1.0 proximity score, not literal minutes, AND demo connector apartments have no coordinates at all so any threshold excludes every demo result (refined from RC1's docs/33 Known Gaps #1)
A filter-value validation error surfaces as a job's error_summary string, not an immediate form-level 400 (docs/33 Known Gaps #2)
property_type filtering cannot be meaningfully exercised against demo connector fixtures; only RentCast populates that field (docs/33 Known Gaps #3)
The currency filter always excludes demo-connector apartments; they never populate Apartment.currency (same category as property_type gap; newly documented in RC2)

Real monitoring runs against demo connectors can never produce a genuine price/availability/new-match change event, at any number of repeated runs, since demo fixtures are 100% static (refined from RC1's docs/33 Known Gaps #4)
The geographic-analysis section renders a raw Python dict repr instead of a clean 'not available' message when no geo data exists (cosmetic; newly documented in RC2)
Duplicate saved-search names are allowed with no uniqueness warning (newly documented in RC2)
config/pilot.example.json's example budget (350-750 EUR) returns zero results against actual demo fixture prices (950-2600 EUR) (newly documented in RC2)
No commercial rental platform (Zillow, Apartments.com, Rightmove, Idealista, Fotocasa, ImmoScout24, etc.) has a real connector in this release
No config-file loader exists; config/pilot.example.json is a documented reference for manual entry into the web form or CLI flags
